title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to cloud-based infrastructure, potentially leading to service disruptions, data loss, and financial damage. Exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines could allow attackers to spread malicious code across multiple environments.
recommended_actions: Conduct an immediate audit of CI/CD pipelines to identify and remediate any vulnerabilities or unauthorized access.
Implement robust access controls and multi-factor authentication for all cloud infrastructure and CI/CD tools.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments to mitigate ransomware impact.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk; however, its widespread adoption could lead to potential misuse by attackers to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, if the tool has undisclosed flaws or backdoors, it could introduce risks to organizations using it.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough security review of the tool's source code before using it in production environments.
Ensure that all dependencies and software identified by the scanner are patched promptly to reduce exposure to known vulnerabilities.
Monitor the tool's updates and community discussions for any reports of misuse or security issues.

title: Responsive FileManager's allows an unauthenticated attacker to upload files of any type and...
description:
Responsive FileManager's allows an unauthenticated attacker to upload files of any type and extension without restriction using dialog.php endpoint, leading to Remote Code Execution. 

This project is unmaintained at the time of CVE assignment. The vulnerability was found in the latest release 9.14.0

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5482.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, exposes web-accessible...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, exposes web-accessible file paths that are not protected by an authorization scheme. An unauthenticated attacker can directly access HTTP endpoints to download files from locations such as /Resources/CompanyId_[ID]/Audio/ and /SafeData/.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34028.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, does not sufficiently...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, does not sufficiently validate the branch code when a new branch is created. The branch code is later used in multiple application functions, including filesystem path generation for uploaded files, profile pictures, and settings. An authenticated attacker with the settings_branches_manage privilege can include path traversal sequences in the branch code and influence the final filesystem location used by affected file operat

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34030.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains insufficient...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains insufficient server-side file type validation in the /safe/contract/uploadcustomdocuments endpoint. The application validates uploaded files based on the user-controlled HTTP Content-Type value and accepts the upload if this value contains an allowed string such as pdf, jpeg, tiff, or png. An authenticated attacker with any role or permission level can spoof the Content-Type value and upload arbitrary file content.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34027.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a hard-coded...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a hard-coded cryptographic key in the SafeSystem.Infrastructure.Security.dll component. An attacker with access to the application files can reverse engineer the DLL and recover the hard-coded cryptographic key. This key can be used to decrypt the licence.whs file, which contains sensitive information about the licensing party and a second key that can be used to decrypt other configuration files.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The presence of a hard-coded cryptographic key in the SafeController software allows attackers to reverse engineer the application, potentially exposing sensitive licensing and configuration data. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, or tampering with system configurations.
recommended_actions: Immediately release a patch to remove the hard-coded cryptographic key and replace it with a secure key management system.
Notify all affected users and organizations to update their software to the patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities in other components of the software.

title: Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a path traversal...
description: Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a path traversal vulnerability in the documentName parameter of the /safe/selfservice/openselfservicedocument endpoint. The application constructs a file path using attacker-controlled input without sufficient validation, allowing an authenticated attacker with any role or permission level to traverse out of the intended document directory and download arbitrary files accessible to the application. This includes, but is

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The path traversal vulnerability in Wertheim SafeController Software allows authenticated attackers to access and download arbitrary files on the server, potentially exposing sensitive information such as configuration files, credentials, or other critical data. This can lead to data breaches, privilege escalation, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Apply input validation and sanitization to ensure the 'documentName' parameter does not allow directory traversal sequences (e.g., '../').
Update to a patched version of the software as soon as a fix is released by the vendor.
Restrict file access permissions at the operating system level to limit exposure of sensitive files to the application.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains missing...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains missing authorization checks on multiple web application endpoints. An authenticated attacker with minimal privileges can access endpoints that are not visible in the frontend but remain directly reachable. This allows the attacker to perform restricted actions such as switching the user's branch, uploading arbitrary files, downloading arbitrary files, and viewing details of arbitrary branches.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34024.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an IP restriction...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an IP restriction bypass vulnerability in the login process. The application restricts user logins based on the IP address associated with a branch location, but the client IP address is derived from the HTTP X-Forwarded-For header when that header is present. An attacker with valid branch user credentials can manipulate the X-Forwarded-For header during login to spoof the expected branch IP address and obtain a vali

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34025.

title: When the application executes the JavaScript script embedded in the PDF within the sandbox, it...
description: When the application executes the JavaScript script embedded in the PDF within the sandbox, it fails to intercept some dangerous interfaces, which allows remote scripts to be loaded, resulting in arbitrary code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12057.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an incorrect...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability in the WebSocket communication used by the SafeController WebMessageBroker. An authenticated attacker with valid low-privileged branch user credentials can manipulate WebSocket messages by specifying controller identifiers belonging to other branches. This allows the attacker to access restricted functions and resources in other branches, including activating boxes outside of

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated low-privileged users to escalate their access by manipulating WebSocket messages, potentially gaining unauthorized control over restricted functions and resources in other branches. This could lead to unauthorized activation of secure systems, data breaches, or operational disruptions.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply patches or updates provided by the vendor to address the vulnerability in AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014.
Implement strict WebSocket message validation and monitoring to detect and prevent unauthorized manipulations.
Enforce least privilege principles and review user access controls to limit the impact of compromised low-privileged accounts.

title: The Wertheim SafeController 5400, Controller 5400 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22320, uses RS-485...
description: The Wertheim SafeController 5400, Controller 5400 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22320, uses RS-485 communication between the server and the microcontroller without cryptographic protection. An attacker with access to the communication path between the server and the microcontroller can sniff RS-485 messages and replay previously observed messages. This can be used, for example, to spoof a "quit alarm" message and continuously deactivate the safe alarm.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34021.

title: Quick.CMS deserializes user-controlled data received over plaintext HTTP without ensuring...
description: Quick.CMS deserializes user-controlled data received over plaintext HTTP without ensuring integrity or authenticity. This allows attackers to tamper with serialized payloads in transit and inject malicious objects. Because deserialization is performed without proper validation or class restrictions, crafted payloads can trigger dangerous magic methods (e.g., __wakeup() and __destruct()) and leverage gadget chains, resulting in arbitrary code execution. Exploitation is triggered automatically whe

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Quick.CMS allows attackers to exploit insecure deserialization over plaintext HTTP, leading to arbitrary code execution. This could result in data breaches, system compromise, or unauthorized access to sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Quick.CMS to the latest patched version if available, or apply any security patches provided by the vendor.
Enforce the use of HTTPS to secure data in transit and prevent tampering with serialized payloads.
Implement strict validation and class restrictions for deserialized objects to prevent the execution of malicious payloads.

title: Multiple printer drivers provided by Ricoh Company, Ltd. and KONICA MINOLTA JAPAN, INC. contain a...
description: Multiple printer drivers provided by Ricoh Company, Ltd. and KONICA MINOLTA JAPAN, INC. contain a privilege escalation vulnerability. If this vulnerability is exploited, an attacker who can log in to a computer running an affected printer driver could elevate privileges by using a specially crafted driver.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-50100.

title: The Wertheim SafeController Family 65000, Controller 65000 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22319,...
description: The Wertheim SafeController Family 65000, Controller 65000 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22319, uses weak custom cryptographic algorithms with hard-coded cryptographic keys to protect communication. An attacker in an adversary-in-the-middle position can decrypt the data traffic. During reassessment, it was possible to break the encryption/decryption routine and decrypt messages without knowledge of the encryption key. It was also possible to gain knowledge about the encryption key by intercepting

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use of weak cryptographic algorithms and hard-coded keys in the Wertheim SafeController Family 65000 allows attackers to decrypt sensitive communication, potentially exposing confidential data and enabling unauthorized access to systems. This vulnerability could lead to data breaches, operational disruptions, and compromise of critical infrastructure.
recommended_actions: Immediately replace the weak custom cryptographic algorithm with a standard, secure encryption protocol such as AES-256.
Remove hard-coded cryptographic keys and implement secure key management practices, including dynamic key generation and storage in secure hardware modules.
Conduct a comprehensive security audit of all systems using the affected controllers to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities.

title: A flaw was found in Ansible Lightspeed. This vulnerability, related to insufficient session...
description: A flaw was found in Ansible Lightspeed. This vulnerability, related to insufficient session expiration, allows a remote attacker to maintain persistent access to the Ansible Lightspeed instance. If an attacker exfiltrates a valid OAuth (Open Authorization) access token before a user logs out, they can continue to authenticate and access sensitive data. This is because the application fails to invalidate the token on the backend, leaving it valid until its natural expiration. This can lead to una

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Ansible Lightspeed allows attackers to maintain unauthorized access to sensitive data by exploiting insufficient session expiration mechanisms. This can lead to data breaches, unauthorized actions, and persistent access to critical systems.
recommended_actions: Implement stricter session management policies, including immediate invalidation of OAuth tokens upon user logout.
Update the Ansible Lightspeed instance to patch the vulnerability as soon as a fix is released.
Monitor OAuth token usage for unusual activity and revoke compromised tokens proactively.

title: The Form Builder CP WordPress plugin before 1.2.47 does not properly sanitize a form...
description: The Form Builder CP WordPress plugin before 1.2.47 does not properly sanitize a form configuration value before storing it and using it as part of a client-side script execution, allowing authenticated users with Editor-level access and above to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks against any visitor of a page rendering the affected form, even when the `unfiltered_html` capability is disallowed (e.g. in a multisite network).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9278.

title: The WP MAPS PRO WordPress plugin before 6.1.1 registers an unauthenticated AJAX action which,...
description: The WP MAPS PRO WordPress plugin before 6.1.1 registers an unauthenticated AJAX action which, given a valid nonce that is publicly emitted on any frontend page enqueuing its map script, unconditionally creates an administrator account and returns a magic-login URL granting interactive admin access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8935.

title: The WP Go Maps  WordPress plugin before 10.0.10 does not properly enforce the marker approval...
description: The WP Go Maps  WordPress plugin before 10.0.10 does not properly enforce the marker approval filter on the admin-ajax fallback for its datatables route, allowing unauthenticated visitors to retrieve marker records that the site owner has not approved for public display, including their title, category, address and description fields.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8385.

title: The WP Go Maps  WordPress plugin before 10.0.10 does not perform any approval-state filtering on...
description: The WP Go Maps  WordPress plugin before 10.0.10 does not perform any approval-state filtering on its public single-marker REST endpoint, allowing unauthenticated users to retrieve marker records that an administrator has not yet approved for public display, including any PII placed in the address and description fields and the marker's geographic coordinates.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the WP Go Maps plugin allows unauthenticated users to access sensitive data, including personally identifiable information (PII) and geographic coordinates, which could lead to privacy violations and targeted attacks.
recommended_actions: Update the WP Go Maps plugin to version 10.0.10 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and audit any exposed data for potential misuse or unauthorized access.
Implement additional security measures, such as restricting access to REST endpoints using authentication mechanisms.

title: A vulnerability was found in Yealink SIP-T46U 108.86.0.118. This impacts the function sprintf of...
description: A vulnerability was found in Yealink SIP-T46U 108.86.0.118. This impacts the function sprintf of the file /api/upgrade/upgrade of the component Firmware Chunk Upload Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument uid/start_offset results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack needs to be approached within the local network. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12221.

title: CVE-2023-54352 - WordPress Seotheme contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attack
description: WordPress Seotheme contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code by uploading malicious files to the theme directory. Attackers can access the uploaded PHP shell at /wp-content/themes/seotheme/mar.php to execute system commands and upload additional files for persistent access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2023-54352.

title: CVE-2023-54351 - WordPress Sonaar Music Plugin 4.7 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows u
description: WordPress Sonaar Music Plugin 4.7 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts through the comment functionality. Attackers can submit JavaScript payloads in the comment parameter to wp-comments-post.php which are stored and executed in the browsers of users viewing the affected playlist pages.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute stored cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or the distribution of malicious payloads to users viewing affected playlist pages. This can compromise user trust and lead to reputational damage for affected websites.
recommended_actions: Update the Sonaar Music Plugin to the latest patched version immediately if available. If no patch exists, disable the plugin temporarily.
Implement input validation and sanitization on user-submitted data, particularly for the comment functionality.
Enable a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.

title: CVE-2023-54350 - WordPress Augmented-Reality plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the elFinder co
description: WordPress Augmented-Reality plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the elFinder connector that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP files. Attackers can send POST requests to the connector.minimal.php endpoint with mkfile and put commands to create malicious PHP files in the file_manager directory and execute them on the server.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2023-54350.

title: CVE-2022-50953 - WordPress Plugin admin-word-count-column 2.2 contains a local file read vulnerability that allows un
description: WordPress Plugin admin-word-count-column 2.2 contains a local file read vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by exploiting null byte injection in the path parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to download-csv.php with a crafted path parameter containing directory traversal sequences and null bytes to bypass file restrictions and read sensitive files like system configuration.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2022-50953.

title: CVE-2021-47984 - WordPress Plugin WP24 Domain Check 1.6.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that a
description: WordPress Plugin WP24 Domain Check 1.6.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by submitting crafted input to the fieldnameDomain parameter. Attackers can inject JavaScript payloads through the plugin settings form at options.php that execute in the browsers of administrators viewing the settings page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2021-47984.

title: CVE-2021-47983 - WordPress Plugin Stripe Payments 2.0.39 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that al
description: WordPress Plugin Stripe Payments 2.0.39 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts through the AcceptStripePayments-settings[currency_code] parameter. Attackers can submit POST requests to /wp-admin/options.php with script payloads in the currency_code field to execute arbitrary JavaScript in administrator browsers when settings are viewed.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2021-47983.

title: CVE-2021-47982 - WordPress Plugin WP-Paginate 2.1.3 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows
description: WordPress Plugin WP-Paginate 2.1.3 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by manipulating the preset parameter. Attackers can submit POST requests to the plugin settings page with script payloads in the preset parameter that are stored and executed when administrators view the settings.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2021-47982.

title: CVE-2026-11474 - A security flaw has been discovered in Kushan2k student-management-system up to f16a4ceaddd6729c4b30
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Kushan2k student-management-system up to f16a4ceaddd6729c4b306ed4641cda3176c1ef2a. Affected is an unknown function of the file service/RegisterService.php of the component Registration Endpoint. Performing a manipulation of the argument stimg results in unrestricted upload. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. This product uses a rolling release model to deliver continuous updates. As a result, specific version information for affected or updated releases is not available. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11474.

title: CVE-2026-11473 - A vulnerability was identified in jflyfox jfinal_cms up to 5.1.0. This impacts the function list of
description: A vulnerability was identified in jflyfox jfinal_cms up to 5.1.0. This impacts the function list of the file AdvicefeedbackController.java. Such manipulation of the argument orderBy leads to sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11473.

title: CVE-2026-11472 - A vulnerability was determined in SourceCodester Class and Exam Timetabling System 1.0. This affects
description: A vulnerability was determined in SourceCodester Class and Exam Timetabling System 1.0. This affects an unknown function of the file /index1.php. This manipulation of the argument Password causes sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11472.

title: CVE-2026-11471 - A vulnerability was found in SourceCodester Class and Exam Timetabling System 1.0. The impacted elem
description: A vulnerability was found in SourceCodester Class and Exam Timetabling System 1.0. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /index2.php. The manipulation of the argument Password results in sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11471.

title: CVE-2026-11470 - A vulnerability has been found in hs-web hsweb-framework up to 5.0.1. The affected element is the fu
description: A vulnerability has been found in hs-web hsweb-framework up to 5.0.1. The affected element is the function denied of the file hsweb-system/hsweb-system-file/src/main/java/org/hswebframework/web/file/FileUploadProperties.java of the component File Upload. The manipulation of the argument filename leads to path traversal. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The identifier of the patch is 8009845b577d8a2c4bbf4fdd8e8913799a714be6. It is suggested to install a patch to address this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11470.

title: CVE-2026-11469 - A flaw has been found in jishenghua jshERP up to 3.6. Impacted is the function insertPlatformConfig
description: A flaw has been found in jishenghua jshERP up to 3.6. Impacted is the function insertPlatformConfig of the file jshERP-boot/src/main/java/com/jsh/erp/service/PlatformConfigService.java of the component platformConfig Add Endpoint. Executing a manipulation of the argument platformValue can lead to server-side request forgery. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been published and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11469.

title: CVE-2026-11468 - A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Hospitals Patient Records Management System 1.0. This
description: A vulnerability was detected in SourceCodester Hospitals Patient Records Management System 1.0. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file /admin/?page=room_types. Performing a manipulation of the argument room results in cross site scripting. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11468.

title: CVE-2026-11467 - A security vulnerability has been detected in jishenghua jshERP up to 3.6. This vulnerability affect
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in jishenghua jshERP up to 3.6. This vulnerability affects the function addAccountHeadAndDetail of the file jshERP-boot/src/main/java/com/jsh/erp/service/AccountHeadService.java of the component addAccountHeadAndDetail Endpoint. Such manipulation of the argument fileName leads to path traversal. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11467.
